Atomization is a social phenomenon where [[corporate groups]] are broken up and people are treated as individuals

It is often but not always motivated by [[Individualism]] and its opposite is [[vulcanization]]
[[Category:Alienation]]
[[Category:Community]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
